data.title: 国际服网页活动「Castle of Hearts」
data.summary: [Web View Event Notice] Sensei! Black Tortoise Promenade is hosting a Feast Snack-Making Experience
data.body:
[Web View Event Notice]

Sensei! Black Tortoise Promenade is hosting a Feast Snack-Making Experience in preparation for the festival in Shanhaijing! 🎉🍪

Enjoy the unique and fun episodes of the Red Winter Federal Academy students and don’t forget to claim your event rewards~! 

➡️Event Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2733239

#BlueArchive![GkCyRRgaAAUh6Mk.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/vRWyvkaI5yLHGfp0mEINeL8yx5wElByn.jpg)
